events.text: Alireza Jahanbakhsh (IR Iran) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  England 1, IR Iran 0. Jude Bellingham (England) header from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Luke Shaw with a cross.
Goal!  England 2, IR Iran 0. Bukayo Saka (England) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Harry Maguire with a headed pass   following a corner.
Goal!  England 3, IR Iran 0. Raheem Sterling (England) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Harry Kane with a cross.
Morteza Pouraliganji (IR Iran) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  England 4, IR Iran 0. Bukayo Saka (England) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Raheem Sterling.
Goal!  England 4, IR Iran 1. Mehdi Taremi (IR Iran) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Ali Gholizadeh with a through ball.
Goal!  England 5, IR Iran 1. Marcus Rashford (England) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Harry Kane.
Goal!  England 6, IR Iran 1. Jack Grealish (England) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Callum Wilson.
Goal!  England 6, IR Iran 2. Mehdi Taremi (IR Iran) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
